

# What is AWS Elemental On-Premises?
<a name="what-is"></a>

AWS Elemental appliances and software encode and package video assets on-premises. For documentation on a specific AWS Elemental on-premises product, see the following links. 
+ [AWS Elemental Live and Statmux Documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elemental-live)
+ [AWS Elemental Conductor Live 3 Documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elemental-live)
+ [AWS Elemental Server and Conductor File Documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elemental-server)
